Notice And Motion For Order Discharging Deft And X-Complainant Nationwide Life & Annuity Insurance Co. And Request For Attys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE LIFE AND ANNUITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Order Discharging Defendant And Cross-Complainant Nationwide Life & Annuity Insurance Co. And Request For Attorneys' Fees And Costs. Appearances: John Viola, Esq., of Dykema Gossett LLP, (213) 457-1800, (appearing thru CourtCall), appearing for Defendant Nationwide Life and Annuity Insurance Company, and moving party; Peter Liederman, Esq., Law Offices of Peter Liederman, Attorney at Law, (510) 681-6916, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party. Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. NATIONWIDE LIFE SHALL BE AWARDED ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS OF $2,700 FROM THE INTERPLEADED FUNDS ON DEPOSIT WITH THE COURT. NATIONWIDE LIFE IS DISMISSED FROM THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NATIONWIDE LIFE'S PROPOSED ORDER IS ADOPTED. Order signed in Open Court. (302/CWW/VC) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
